description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black and dark olive finish. It has a straight, elongated barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle and a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The stock is fixed and robust, providing stability for accurate shooting, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. A full-length Picatinny rail runs along the top of the receiver, allowing for the attachment of various optics or accessories, though no sighting device is currently mounted. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a durable yet lightweight feel.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and a matte black and olive finish. Features a Picatinny rail and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the flash hider.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and the Picatinny rail along the top.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the magazine and grip partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same key features from the other side.
